text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace. One major impact is automation, where machines handle repetitive tasks like data entry or assembly line work. This frees up employees for more creative or strategic roles. Additionally, productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart scheduling assistants and data analysis software, help workers complete tasks faster and with fewer errors. However, this doesn't mean AI replaces human workers entirely. The future emphasizes human-AI collaboration, where people guide AI systems and make final decisions. As a result, some jobs will change or disappear, but new roles in AI management, training, and ethics will emerge. Adapting to these changes will be essential.
